revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿六]][[zh:八月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 26|qq=August 26}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}}) – In the {{ill|Hōgen rebellion|en|Hōgen rebellion|qid=Q842357|lt=Hōgen Rebellion|1=Hōgen rebellion}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|en|Minamoto no Tametomo|qid=Q1339356|lt=Minamoto no Tamechika|1=Minamoto no Tametomo}} was captured after his defeat and exiled to {{ill|Izu Ōshima|en|Izu Ōshima|qid=Q1070580|lt=Izu Ōshima|1=Izu Ōshima}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1604|en|1604|qid=Q6738|lt=1604|1=1604}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} issued a travel permit ({{ill|渡航朱印状|ja|渡航朱印状|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/渡航朱印状|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) to the merchant Sumi Kakurakura (角倉了以) for trade. == Births == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashima|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashima|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (died {{ill|1718|en|1718|qid=Q6899|lt=1718|1=1718}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1665|en|1665|qid=Q7582|lt=1665|1=1665}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|qid=Q2929|lt=October 4|1=October 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunetomo|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunetomo|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6992849}}, the head of the {{ill|Kii Domain|ja|紀伊藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 紀州藩|1=Kishū Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069187}} and older brother of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}} (died {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninna|1=Ninna}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|887|en|887|qid=Q25010|lt=887|1=887}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōkō|en|Emperor Kōkō|qid=Q440518|lt=Emperor Kōkō|1=Emperor Kōkō}}, the 58th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}. * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|qid=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|en|Emperor Sutoku|qid=Q349287|lt=Emperor Sutoku|1=Emperor Sutoku}}, the 75th Emperor (born {{ill|1119|en|1119|qid=Q19540|lt=1119|1=1119}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}}) – {{ill|Ii Naotora|en|Ii Naotora|qid=Q11161448|lt=Ii Naotora|1=Ii Naotora}}. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|qid=Q349440|lt=Emperor Go-Yōzei|1=Emperor Go-Yōzei}}, the 107th Emperor (born {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}}). * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku|1=正德}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}}) – {{ill|Morikawa Koryoku|ja|森川許六|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morikawa Koryoku|1=Morikawa Kyoriku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11539642}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正聞重徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|25|8|27|7|26|9|8|0826|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 26일]] [[ja:8月26日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿六]]
[[ar:August 26 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿六]]
